lyrics.jp: 真っ白な心に惹かれ
lyrics.en: Drawn to a pure white heart

lyrics.jp: 真実をさまよえば
lyrics.en: If I wander through the truth

lyrics.jp: 真っ黒なところはぶち抜かれ
lyrics.en: The pitch-black places are broken through

lyrics.jp: 真新しい風にまた抱かれた
lyrics.en: Embraced again by a brand new wind

lyrics.jp: 好きだよ 好きだけど
lyrics.romaji: Suki da yo, suki da kedo
lyrics.en: I love you, I really do, but...

lyrics.jp: 離れなくちゃ 置いてかなきゃ
lyrics.en: I have to leave, I have to go without you

lyrics.jp: 好きだよ 知らんけど
lyrics.en: I love you, though I don't know why

lyrics.jp: 私たちもう そんな頃よ
lyrics.en: We've already reached that time

lyrics.jp: 先にさよならするわ
lyrics.en: I'll say goodbye first

lyrics.jp: 悪いのはそうよいつも私でいいの
lyrics.romaji: Warui no wa sou yo itsumo watashi de ii no
lyrics.en: It's fine if the bad one is always me

lyrics.jp: 先に進まなければゴールできぬゲームなのよ
lyrics.romaji: Saki ni susumanakere ba gooru dekinu geemu na no yo
lyrics.en: It's a game where you can't reach the goal without moving forward first

vocab.meaning: to be drawn to, to be attracted
to be embraced, to be held
to separate, to leave, to part
